meta.title: RS Opritten & Terrassen — Driveways, patios and garden design
meta.description: Your partner for driveways, patios and garden design for over 20 years. Paving and green spaces — all in one hand. Request a free quote.

hero.title: Your partner for driveways, patios and gardens
hero.subtitle: Over 20 years of craftsmanship — paving and green spaces in one hand.

about.title: About us
about.text: With over 20 years of experience, RS Opritten & Terrassen guarantees quality work. From driveways and patios to complete garden installation and maintenance — everything is handled in-house. No subcontractors, no detours. You speak directly with the craftsman who does the work.
about.usp1_text: Over two decades of expertise in paving and green spaces.
about.usp2_text: Both paving and green work — you only need one point of contact.
about.usp3_text: Everything is personally executed. No subcontractors, no surprises.

services.title: Our services
services.subtitle: From paving works to garden maintenance — we provide the complete finish.
services.cat_opritten_items: Driveway • Parking • Patio • Pathways • Clinkers • Concrete slabs • Paving renovation • Flooring • Screed • Tiling
services.cat_tuinaanleg_items: New garden • Garden renovation • Plantings • Turf • Bark mulch • Drainage • Garden clinkers • Garden patio
services.cat_afsluitingen_items: Garden fence • Wire fence • Wire panels • Wooden screens • Gabions
services.cat_onderhoud_items: General maintenance • Mowing • Fertilizing • Moss removal • Hedge trimming • Weeding • Pruning • Driveway/patio cleaning
